tooltip.elements-plus.steel_pipe: A Magical Steel Pipe, maybe edible with some §lside effects§r.
tooltip.elements-plus.wrench: A wrench that can turn pipes
tooltip.elements-plus.steel_pipe_l: A Steel Pipe with a shape of a L, it can carry redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.steel_pipe_i: A Steel Pipe with a shape of a I, it can carry redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.steel_pipe_t: A Steel Pipe with a shape of a T, it can carry redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.steel_pipe_x: A Steel Pipe with a shape of a X, it can carry redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_transisto: A transistor made of amethyst, it can amplify the redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_diode: A diode made of amethyst, it can only allow the redstone signal to pass in one direction
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_capacitor: A capacitor made of amethyst, it can store the redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_resistor: A resistor made of amethyst, it can reduce the redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_resonator: A resonator made of amethyst, it can resonate the redstone signal
tooltip.elements-plus.amethyst_battery: A battery made of amethyst, it can provide the redstone signal
